from langflow.custom import Component
from langflow.io import StrInput, SecretStrInput, Output
from langflow.field_typing import Tool
from langchain.tools import Tool as LangchainTool
import requests
import pandas as pd
import time


class DatosBVLToolComponent(Component):
    display_name = "Datos BVL Tool"
    description = "Tool con datos e indicadores técnicos desde Alpha Vantage"
    icon = "database"
    name = "DatosBVLTool"

    inputs = [
        SecretStrInput(
            name="api_key",
            display_name="Alpha Vantage API Key",
            required=True,
        ),
        StrInput(
            name="default_tickers",
            display_name="Tickers por defecto",
            value="BVN,SCCO",
        ),
    ]

    outputs = [
        Output(display_name="Tool", name="tool_output", method="build_tool"),
    ]

    def build_tool(self) -> Tool:
        api_key = self.api_key
        default_tickers = self.default_tickers

        def calcular_rsi(precios, periodo=14):
            delta = precios.diff()
            ganancia = delta.where(delta > 0, 0).rolling(window=periodo).mean()
            perdida = -delta.where(delta < 0, 0).rolling(window=periodo).mean()
            rs = ganancia / perdida
            rsi = 100 - (100 / (1 + rs))
            return rsi.iloc[-1] if not pd.isna(rsi.iloc[-1]) else 50.0

        def obtener_datos_bvl(input_text: str = "") -> str:
            if input_text and input_text.strip():
                tickers = [t.strip().upper() for t in input_text.split(",")]
            else:
                tickers = [t.strip() for t in default_tickers.split(",")]

            resultado = ["=== DATOS REALES (Alpha Vantage) ==="]

            for ticker in tickers:
                try:
                    # Descargar histórico (últimos 60 días)
                    url = f"https://www.alphavantage.co/query?function=TIME_SERIES_DAILY&symbol={ticker}&outputsize=compact&apikey={api_key}"
                    response = requests.get(url, timeout=15)
                    data = response.json()

                    if "Time Series (Daily)" not in data:
                        resultado.append(f"\n{ticker}: Sin datos disponibles")
                        time.sleep(12)  # Rate limit
                        continue

                    # Convertir a DataFrame
                    ts = data["Time Series (Daily)"]
                    df = pd.DataFrame.from_dict(ts, orient='index')
                    df.columns = ['Open', 'High', 'Low', 'Close', 'Volume']
                    df = df.astype(float)
                    df = df.sort_index()
                    df = df.tail(60)  # Últimos 60 días

                    if len(df) < 2:
                        resultado.append(f"\n{ticker}: Datos insuficientes")
                        continue

                    # Calcular indicadores
                    precio_actual = df['Close'].iloc[-1]
                    precio_anterior = df['Close'].iloc[-2]
                    cambio_pct = ((precio_actual - precio_anterior) / precio_anterior) * 100

                    # RSI
                    rsi = calcular_rsi(df['Close'])

                    # MACD
                    ema12 = df['Close'].ewm(span=12, adjust=False).mean()
                    ema26 = df['Close'].ewm(span=26, adjust=False).mean()
                    macd = ema12 - ema26
                    signal = macd.ewm(span=9, adjust=False).mean()
                    hist = macd - signal

                    # SMAs
                    sma20 = df['Close'].rolling(window=20).mean().iloc[-1]
                    sma50 = df['Close'].rolling(window=50).mean().iloc[-1] if len(df) >= 50 else None

                    if rsi >= 70:
                        rsi_zona = "sobrecompra"
                    elif rsi <= 30:
                        rsi_zona = "sobreventa"
                    else:
                        rsi_zona = "neutral"

                    if sma50 is not None:
                        tendencia = "alcista" if sma20 > sma50 else "bajista"
                        sma50_str = f"${sma50:.2f}"
                    else:
                        tendencia = "indeterminada"
                        sma50_str = "N/A"

                    reporte = (
                        f"\n{ticker}:\n"
                        f"- Precio: ${precio_actual:.2f} | Cambio: {cambio_pct:+.2f}%\n"
                        f"- RSI(14): {rsi:.2f} -> {rsi_zona}\n"
                        f"- MACD: {macd.iloc[-1]:.4f} | Signal: {signal.iloc[-1]:.4f} | Histograma: {hist.iloc[-1]:.4f}\n"
                        f"- SMA20: ${sma20:.2f} | SMA50: {sma50_str}\n"
                        f"- Tendencia: {tendencia}"
                    )
                    resultado.append(reporte)

                    time.sleep(12)  # Rate limit: 5 req/min

                except Exception as e:
                    resultado.append(f"\n{ticker}: Error - {str(e)}")

            return "\n".join(resultado)

        tool = LangchainTool(
            name="obtener_datos_bvl",
            description=(
                "Obtiene datos REALES e indicadores técnicos desde Alpha Vantage: "
                "precio, cambio %, RSI(14), MACD, SMA20, SMA50, tendencia. "
                "Acciones: Buenaventura (BVN), Southern Copper (SCCO). "
                "Input: tickers separados por coma."
            ),
            func=obtener_datos_bvl,
        )
        return tool
